steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Words in Context question. The blank describes how the relationship between oil shocks and national economic activity has changed as non-oil energy use has grown. The follow-up evidence — that oil shocks’ effect on India’s GDP was “only slightly greater than zero” — shows the relationship has become much weaker over time. The blank must mean diminished or weakened.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘reverted’: to return to a previous state — the passage shows the relationship has shrunk to nearly nothing, not returned to some former condition. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘acquiesced’: to comply or submit reluctantly — a relationship between oil shocks and economic activity cannot submit or comply; the word does not fit the context. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘oscillated’: to swing back and forth between states — the passage describes a sustained weakening, not fluctuation in either direction. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘abated’: to diminish or become less intense — the relationship has abated: its effect on GDP has shrunk to nearly zero as non-oil energy has grown. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
